payload.source_text: Nucleus Platform v2 Kickoff Meeting Notes. Milestones: Complete API migration to v2 schema by end of June. Platform v2 public beta launch by end of Q3. Team: Sarah Chen is CTO and executive sponsor. Marco Russo is Head of Engineering and owns technical delivery.

items.description: Complete API migration to v2 schema
Platform v2 public beta launch
Sarah Chen (CTO, executive sponsor)
Marco Russo (Head of Engineering)

payload.source_text: Nucleus Platform v2 Risk and Issue Review. Risks: Third-party auth provider stability — Authify outages could block user registrations during beta launch, high priority. Database migration window too short — 4-hour window may not suffice, high priority. Issues: Login fails intermittently on iOS Safari private browsing, currently in progress. Report export crashes for datasets over 500 items, medium priority.

items.description: Third-party auth provider (Authify) instability risk
Database migration window too short for data volume
Login fails intermittently on iOS Safari in private browsing mode
Report export crashes for datasets over 500 items

payload.description: Add auth retry logic with exponential backoff
